# Model Artifacts

This directory stores trained model files generated by the notebook. These files are not committed to version control due to file size.

## Files (generated by running the notebook)

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| `early_warning_rf_balanced.pkl` | Trained Tuned Balanced Random Forest model |
| `model_features.pkl` | Ordered list of feature column names expected by the model |
| `scaler.pkl` | Fitted StandardScaler (used for logistic regression; saved for pipeline completeness) |

## How to Generate

Run the full `notebooks/Final_Modelling_V1.ipynb` notebook. The model export cells at the end will save these artifacts to this directory.

## Model Details

- **Algorithm:** Random Forest Classifier (class_weight="balanced")
- **Tuned hyperparameters:** n_estimators=200, max_depth=10, min_samples_split=5, min_samples_leaf=4, max_features=None
- **Training data:** 26,038 records (80% stratified split)
- **Feature count:** 36 (after one-hot encoding)
- **Prediction window:** Day 30 (early-warning constraint)
